nodes.name: Cron Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every Sunday at 6 PM AEDT.

parameters.query: SELECT register_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PROPOSED') AS proposed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED') AS confirmed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'REJECTED') AS rejected FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE proposed_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY register_name ORDER BY register_name;
SELECT register_name, proposed_data, confidence_label, reviewed_at FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND reviewed_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY reviewed_at DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_runs, SUM(items_proposed) AS total_proposed, SUM(items_confirmed) AS total_confirmed, SUM(items_rejected) AS total_rejected, CASE WHEN SUM(items_proposed) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(items_confirmed)::numeric / SUM(items_proposed) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS confirmation_rate FROM extraction_run WHERE started_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' AND status = 'completed';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_pending, MIN(proposed_at) AS oldest_pending FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE status = 'PROPOSED';

parameters.subject: Weekly Reflection — LIFE OS — {{$now.format('yyyy-MM-dd')}}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('WeeklyReflectionSent', 'system', 'weekly_reflection', jsonb_build_object('week_ending', CURRENT_DATE::text));
INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status) VALUES ('weekly_reflection', NOW(), 'ok') ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status;

meta.description: Runs Sunday 6 PM. Compiles gate summary, confirmed items, extraction quality (confirmation rate), and backlog into a weekly reflection email. This is touchpoint 4 of 4.
